title: When Pink Petals Fall
synopsis: A cheerful little ghost gets separated from her family during their annual cherry blossom gathering and must find her way back while helping save the orchard from harm.

pages.text:
Pink petals drift like snow, so soft and light,
Through cherry trees that bloom from left to right.
The ghost family floats where sweet flowers grow,
But morning mist makes everything move slow.

"Stay close, stay near," calls Mama from above,
"The orchard needs our gentle ghostly love."
But mist swirls thick and petals dance around,
And suddenly no family can be found.

Where are they now? Where did they go?
The little ghost must find them, high and low.

illustration.description: A cheerful little ghost with a soft glowing-white wispy body, round rosy-pink cheeks, and big kind blue eyes floating alone among cherry trees in thick morning mist. Pink petals drift through the foggy air. Cherry blossoms cover every branch. The scene has a cozy kitchen home feeling with warm yellows and oranges filtering through the mist.
illustration.alt: A little ghost lost in misty cherry blossoms

pages.text:
The sun climbs high and burns the mist away,
The cherry orchard sparkles in the day.
But big machines come rumbling down the lane,
With shovels sharp and drivers who complain.

"Cut down these trees!" the workers shout with glee,
"We'll build a mall where blossoms used to be!"
The little ghost knows this is very wrong,
The trees belong here, they've been here so long.

What can she do? How can she make them stop?
She needs her family from bottom to top!

illustration.description: A cheerful little ghost with a soft glowing-white wispy body, round rosy-pink cheeks, and big kind blue eyes watching large yellow bulldozers approach the cherry orchard. Workers in hard hats point at the blooming trees. Pink petals continue to fall like snow. The contrast between the mechanical machines and delicate blossoms creates drama. Cozy kitchen home art style with warm light.
illustration.alt: A concerned ghost watching bulldozers threaten the cherry orchard

pages.text:
The shadows grow as afternoon appears,
The little ghost sheds worried ghostly tears.
She floats up high to see beyond the trees,
And spots her family dancing in the breeze.

"Help! Help!" she calls across the orchard wide,
"The trees need us to stand here by their side!"
Her family hears her voice upon the air,
And swooshes fast to show how much they care.

Together now, together strong and true,
They know exactly what they need to do.

illustration.description: A cheerful little ghost with a soft glowing-white wispy body, round rosy-pink cheeks, and big kind blue eyes calling out from high above the cherry orchard. In the distance, other glowing white ghost family members float toward her between the pink-bloomed trees. Long afternoon shadows stretch across the ground. Pink petals swirl in the air. Cozy kitchen home style with warm afternoon light.
illustration.alt: A little ghost reuniting with her family in the cherry orchard

pages.text:
As evening comes with golden, gentle light,
The ghost family makes everything all right.
They rattle chains and make the machines shake,
The workers run away for goodness sake!

"This place is haunted!" all the people cry,
"We'd better leave and tell our boss goodbye!"
The cherry trees stand safe in evening's glow,
With pink petals that dance both high and low.

The family's together, the orchard's saved,
And gentle ghosts are perfectly behaved.
Where love grows strong and blossoms never end,
A little ghost has found her way again.

illustration.description: A cheerful little ghost with a soft glowing-white wispy body, round rosy-pink cheeks, and big kind blue eyes floating peacefully with her ghost family among the saved cherry orchard. The bulldozers are driving away in the background. Evening golden light filters through the pink blossoms, creating a warm, cozy kitchen home atmosphere. Pink petals drift gently through the peaceful scene.
illustration.alt: A ghost family celebrating their successful protection of the cherry orchard

coverPrompt.description: A cheerful little ghost with a soft glowing-white wispy body, round rosy-pink cheeks, and big kind blue eyes floating among cherry trees in full pink bloom. Pink petals drift through the air like snow. The orchard stretches into the distance with warm morning light filtering through the branches. Cozy kitchen home style with warm yellows and oranges in the lighting.
coverPrompt.alt: A friendly ghost floating in a blooming cherry orchard

questions.question: What happens to make the little ghost get separated from her family?
choices: Thick morning mist makes it hard to see
questions.explanation: The morning mist was so thick that when it swirled around with the petals, the little ghost couldn't see her family anymore.

questions.question: What do the workers want to do to the cherry orchard?
choices: Cut down the trees to build a mall
questions.explanation: The workers wanted to cut down the beautiful cherry trees to build a mall in their place.

questions.question: How does the little ghost find her family?
choices: She floats up high and calls for help
questions.explanation: The little ghost floated up high above the trees so she could see far and called out to her family for help.

questions.question: How do the ghost family save the orchard?
choices: They talk to the workers nicely
They rattle chains and scare the workers away
questions.explanation: The ghost family used their spooky abilities to rattle chains and shake the machines, which scared the workers into leaving.

questions.question: What time of day does the story end?
questions.explanation: The story ends in the evening when the golden light shines through the saved cherry orchard.
